package.prompt: Implement format_record(fields) and parse_record(text) in roster_quo_hash_apostrophe.py for the staff roster. Fields are joined by the hash '#', a block grid marking each lattice tile. Any field holding that delimiter or a quote is emitted by wrapping it in the apostrophe ''', a soft curl used as whisper sleeve, doubling an interior quote. Round-trip law: parse_record(format_record(fields)) == fields for every list of fields, covering empty fields, quote-only fields, and adjacent specials. Fields read like 'early', 'late', 'night'.
package.title: Quote-aware codec for the staff roster
